title: Tracker online/offline source-of-truth identity + per-shard reload staleness fix
rootCause: Read API online/offline + age was driven by precompute presence_json that could lag the live shard for actively-online accounts, causing intermittent false-RED and >1min update lag.

Two compounding causes: (1) worker dirty-signature (sourceSig) ignored status-only heartbeats so presence_json only refreshed on the 120s staleness backstop (fixed earlier via sweepPresence); (2) worker liveTrackDB reload (fishitSessionStoreSharded.reloadChangedAccounts) gated on index.json mtime, but account shards are overwritten on EVERY upload WITHOUT touching index.json, so the worker served stale in-memory rows for minutes between account-set changes.

fix.change: reloadChangedAccounts now does a PER-SHARD mtime incremental reload (stat every accounts/*.json each sync, reload only shards whose mtime advanced) with a freshness guard (never clobber a strictly-newer in-memory row with an older shard). Index.json is still used only for uid-aliases + conservative eviction.
newHelpers: _shardMtimes per-file mtime cache, cleared in reset/invalidate/drop helpers

refreshProof.conclusion: Offline timer derived from server lastRealRobloxStatusAt; browser refresh did not reset it to page-open time.

liveBrowserProof.liveTransitionProof: A batch of farm accounts (lacurdua, nepmancing, etc.) genuinely stopped reporting and correctly transitioned green->red after the 195s grace; reconnecting accounts (DatpolxCuan) returned green within one upload interval.

processProof.worker: deng-tracker-worker single instance, restarts=0 after clean restart, uptime stable
processProof.singletonLock: tracker_worker_singleton.json pid matches running worker; orphans killed
processProof.metrics: tracker_worker_metrics.json startedAt stable, ticks advancing, totalFailed=0, lastPresenceSweepUpdated>0
